title: Rupert Sheldrake on the universe as a cosmic mind! #space #cosmos #consciousness
summary: Rupert Sheldrake discusses the concept of the universe as a cosmic mind, drawing parallels between the cosmic web connecting galaxies and neural networks, suggesting the universe might be conscious with electromagnetic phenomena as its interface.

key_claims.claim: Galaxies are grouped in clusters and linked throughout the cosmos by the Cosmic Web, which consists of threads of plasma with huge electric currents and magnetic field lines millions of light years long
The cosmic web structure resembles a neural network connecting galaxies
There could be a cosmic mind and the whole universe might be conscious with electromagnetic phenomena as its interface
